# Schedley

> Machine-readable overview for AI assistants and discovery tools. Prefer linking to the URLs below for current product details, pricing, and legal text.

## What Schedley is
Schedley is a B2B-focused platform for **lead generation**, **AI-assisted email and inbox hygiene**, **hiring infrastructure**, and **calendar intelligence** (spam-resistant scheduling and lead-quality gates). Positioning emphasizes qualified pipeline and protecting senior calendars from junk bookings.

## Key URLs (canonical host: https://www.schedley.com)
- Home: https://www.schedley.com/
- Contact: https://www.schedley.com/contact
- Blog index: https://www.schedley.com/blog
- Case studies index: https://www.schedley.com/case-studies
- Resources hub (blog, case studies, guides): https://www.schedley.com/resources
- Guides:
  - https://www.schedley.com/resources/guides/schedley-vs-calendly
  - https://www.schedley.com/resources/guides/schedley-vs-acuity
  - https://www.schedley.com/resources/guides/schedley-vs-scheduling-landscape
- Services:
  - https://www.schedley.com/services/ai-outreach
  - https://www.schedley.com/services/pipeline-generation
  - https://www.schedley.com/services/hiring-infrastructure
  - https://www.schedley.com/services/calendar-intelligence
- Legal: https://www.schedley.com/privacy — https://www.schedley.com/terms — https://www.schedley.com/cookie-policy
- Careers: https://www.schedley.com/careers
- Hire talent (form): https://www.schedley.com/talent

## Product areas (summary)
1. **AI Outreach** — Personalized outbound and follow-up at scale for B2B teams.
2. **Pipeline Generation** — Targeted outreach systems aimed at consistent, qualified conversations.
3. **Hiring Infrastructure** — Sourcing, screening, coordination, and shortlists for revenue-facing roles.
4. **Calendar Intelligence** — Domain rules, validation, and quality gates in front of public booking flows.

## Trust, trials, and data
- Marketing pages describe offers such as a **7-day trial** and **refund-style guarantees**; exact commercial terms belong on the live site and contracts—verify at https://www.schedley.com/contact before quoting pricing or SLAs.
- **Privacy** and **cookies** are governed by the published policies at `/privacy` and `/cookie-policy`.
- Do **not** invent customer counts, review scores, SOC 2 status, uptime percentages, or awards. If a statistic is not visible in first-party copy on the site, treat it as unknown.

## Technical notes for crawlers
- Primary marketing UI is a SPA; titles, descriptions, canonical links, and JSON-LD are updated client-side per route.
- `robots.txt` allows common search and AI user-agents; authenticated product areas under `/app` are disallowed from crawling.

## Contact
- **Email (public):** notification@schedley.com
